title: Knysna Cavaliers outplay Plett Pioneers
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers secured a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers secured a 54-run victory over the Plett Pioneers in a thrilling match the past weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers secured a 54-run victory over the Plett Pioneers in a thrilling match the past weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Batting first, the Cavaliers posted 199 all out, with JP Ellis (48) and Stefan May (40) leading the charge. Danrick Moodien’s superb bowling (5/19) guided the Cavaliers to victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In reply, the Plett Pioneers were bowled out for 145, despite solid contributions from Kevin Brouers (44) and Jacques Ahrense (41). Knysna’s bowlers dominated, with Charl-Francois Marias (3/49) and Ellis (3/41) ensuring a convincing win.","html":"In reply, the Plett Pioneers were bowled out for 145, despite solid contributions from Kevin Brouers (44) and Jacques Ahrense (41). Knysna’s bowlers dominated, with Charl-Francois Marias (3/49) and Ellis (3/41) ensuring a convincing win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars","html":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United (173/6) this past Saturday surpassed Union Stars I (169 all out) on the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league log with a 4-wicket bonus-point victory at the Bridgton Sports Grounds.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United (173/6) this past Saturday surpassed Union Stars I (169 all out) on the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league log with a 4-wicket bonus-point victory at the Bridgton Sports Grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stars I were dismissed for a modest 169, whereafter the visitors, thanks to a match-winning 5th wicket partnership of 103 runs (124 balls; 1x6 and 10x4) between the experienced Le-Roi Bredenkamp 65* and Pieter Stuurman (49), reached the target in the 37th over.","html":"Stars I were dismissed for a modest 169, whereafter the visitors, thanks to a match-winning 5th wicket partnership of 103 runs (124 balls; 1x6 and 10x4) between the experienced Le-Roi Bredenkamp 65* and Pieter Stuurman (49), reached the target in the 37th over."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards are:","html":"The summarised scorecards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers vs Knysna Cavaliers","html":"Plett Pioneers vs Knysna Cavaliers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers 199 all out - 41.5 overs (JP Ellis 48, Stefan May 40, Hayden Sweet 30, Danrick Moodien 5/19, Kevin Brouers 2/25)","html":"Knysna Cavaliers 199 all out - 41.5 overs (JP Ellis 48, Stefan May 40, Hayden Sweet 30, Danrick Moodien 5/19, Kevin Brouers 2/25)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers 145 all out - 32.3 overs (Kevin Brouers 44, Jacques Ahrense 41, JP Ellis 3/41, Charl-Francois Marias 3/49, Francios Bonthuys 2/22)","html":"Plett Pioneers 145 all out - 32.3 overs (Kevin Brouers 44, Jacques Ahrense 41, JP Ellis 3/41, Charl-Francois Marias 3/49, Francios Bonthuys 2/22)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 54 runs.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 54 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars vs Pacaltsdorp United","html":"Union Stars vs Pacaltsdorp United"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 169 all out - 50 overs (Denovan Ekstraal 44, Merlin Masimela 39, Grant Esau 37, Grant Simpson 3/23, Matthew Thorne 2/21, Elih Thorne 2/35)","html":"Union Stars 169 all out - 50 overs (Denovan Ekstraal 44, Merlin Masimela 39, Grant Esau 37, Grant Simpson 3/23, Matthew Thorne 2/21, Elih Thorne 2/35)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 173/6 - 36.3 overs (Le-Roi Bredenkamp 65*, Pieter Stuurman 49, Grant Esau 3/10, Merlin Masimela 2/41)","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 173/6 - 36.3 overs (Le-Roi Bredenkamp 65*, Pieter Stuurman 49, Grant Esau 3/10, Merlin Masimela 2/41)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United won by 4 wickets.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United won by 4 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
